project_core_thesis.market_view: The S&P 500 (SPY) is artificially pinned via mega-cap tech call-wall options manipulation and dark pool crossing mechanisms to prevent necessary market corrections.
project_core_thesis.recent_catalyst: S&P Dow Jones Indices blocked fast-track rules for SpaceX (SPCX) on June 4, 2026, protecting overvalued tech assets from a mechanical capital reallocation wave.
project_core_thesis.systemic_mission: Expose and document these microstructure fault lines via an open, un-erasable alternative data ledger to preserve temporal market memory.

repository_architecture_blueprint.data_ingestion_layer: track_fault_lines.py -> Fetches spot prices and appends them cleanly into an append-only historical database.
repository_architecture_blueprint.microstructure_firewall: intercept_pinning.py -> Monitors intraday volume skews and flags active institutional price pinning.
repository_architecture_blueprint.options_analytics_engine: track_option_decay.py -> Computes option open interest drawdowns and implied volatility crush velocities.
repository_architecture_blueprint.visualization_layer: generate_chart.py -> Renders the real-time volatility fault line dashboard (decoupling_trend.png).
repository_architecture_blueprint.master_database: market_analysis.json -> Maintains the structural append-only historical_timeline ledger.
repository_architecture_blueprint.dialogue_vault: convo.json -> Stores structural macro theses extracted from AI dialogue exchanges.
repository_architecture_blueprint.automation_orchestrator: .github/workflows/market_data.yml -> GitHub Actions cloud runner executing all scripts weekdays at 4:15 PM EST.

ai_agent_behavior_directives.instruction: Never propose modifications that overwrite, truncate, or compress the 'historical_timeline' array inside market_analysis.json. All operations must strictly follow an append-only architecture.
Do not treat new prompts as standalone queries. Interlock all coding, debugging, and analytical logic layers directly with the historical macro thesis documented herein.
Ensure all JSON structures output pristine floating-point consistency to prevent computational compilation errors across automated institutional scraper networks.

session_continuation_handover.current_phase: Core deployment and cloud automation loop finalized and verified green.
session_continuation_handover.next_scheduled_actions: Awaiting user directive to expand data variable tracking, initialize localized server mirrors, or establish real-time cross-index delta alert webhooks.
